title: secure_zero() implementation is correct for its purpose
description: The volatile-pointer secure_zero() pattern (lora_l2.c:44-50, ipv6_addr.c:32-37, lichen_l2.c:32-38) is the standard approach for preventing dead-store elimination. While it could be consolidated into a shared header, the duplication is acceptable for static-inline functions in embedded code where call-site inlining is important.
close_reason: P3 observations acknowledged, no fix needed
